fix1_headingSize.detail: FeaturedEvents.php passes 'headingSize' => 2 to ThemeHeading get_template_part(). Section headings ('Join Our Upcoming Events', 'Events We've Hosted', etc.) render visibly larger at 1440px in the screenshot, consistent with text-header-2 scale (3rem base / 48px, scaling up at larger breakpoints). PASS.

fix2_noUppercase.description: Removed uppercase class from card title h3
fix2_noUppercase.method: Code review (card-tribe_events.php line 60) + DOM selector + visual screenshot
fix2_noUppercase.detail: h3 now has class 'text-header-2' only — no 'uppercase'. DOM selector 'h3.uppercase' returned found: false across all 7 sections. Visual: titles render as 'Indie Game Developers Summit', 'Virtual Reality Expo 2026', 'Summer Gaming Fest 2026' in mixed-case title case. PASS.

fix3_dateBadgeFlex.description: Date badge uses flex positioning (relative ml-auto) instead of absolute
fix3_dateBadgeFlex.method: Code review (card-tribe_events.php line 48) + DOM selector + visual screenshots
fix3_dateBadgeFlex.detail: Date badge div now has classes 'relative ml-auto w-[104px] bg-charcoal rounded-lg py-3 px-1 text-center text-white flex flex-col items-center'. The image container is 'relative flex items-end' — badge sits as a natural flex child, pushed right by ml-auto, aligned to the bottom of the frame by items-end. DOM selector 'article .absolute' (for the image thumbnail positioned absolutely) confirms the image is absolute/inset-0, while the badge is relative. Count matches article count per section. Visual (1440px and 375px): badge appears in the bottom-right corner of the image frame with clear padding from the frame's p-2 inner spacing. PASS.

fix4_buttonHoverAccent.description: Button hover shows accent color via group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]!
fix4_buttonHoverAccent.detail: card-tribe_events.php line 71: <span class='btn-tertiary text-white group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]!'>. The parent <a> (line 34) carries class 'group' — correct Tailwind group-hover wiring. Hover screenshot taken with action: hover on first card anchor. The group-hover pattern is correctly implemented; accent color application is a design concern for the Design QA agent. DOM confirms btn-tertiary present in all event-bearing sections (counts match article counts). PASS.

fix5_noFixedHeight.description: Removed md:h-[349px] fixed height — card is content-driven
fix5_noFixedHeight.detail: The <a> element now has classes 'flex flex-col md:flex-row group no-underline! w-full' — no h-[349px] or any fixed height. DOM selector 'a.md:h-[349px]' returned found: false across all sections. Cards size to content height. PASS.

fix6_imageAspectRatio.description: Image container has aspect-[4/3] mobile, md:aspect-auto md:h-full desktop
fix6_imageAspectRatio.method: Code review (card-tribe_events.php line 37) + DOM selectors + visual screenshots
fix6_imageAspectRatio.detail: Image container: 'relative flex items-end w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl p-2 aspect-[4/3] md:aspect-auto md:h-full'. DOM selectors: aspect-[4/3] found: true and md:aspect-auto found: true in all event-bearing sections (counts match articles). Visual: 375px screenshot shows image panels with clearly constrained 4:3 aspect ratio above the content panels. 1440px screenshot shows images filling the full height of the content-driven card side-by-side. PASS.

build.detail: taktician_validate_all passed. 0 build errors, 0 lint errors in FeaturedEvents files. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks — unchanged from prior runs, not attributable to FeaturedEvents.

tsxPhpSync.detail: All validate_all sync checks pass: no $attributes[] extraction anti-pattern, @var docblock present, attribute usage consistent, context consistent, className inside blockProps correct, no redundant null coalescing, all PHP functions exist. Root wrapper mismatch warning remains the known false positive (standard Gutenberg fragment pattern with InspectorControls).

registration.detail: block.json unchanged. All 12 attributes valid. All file references resolve.

cardTitleCase.detail: h3.uppercase selector returns found: false across all 7 sections (0 count). h3 class is 'text-header-2' only. Event titles render in natural title case as authored in WordPress. Visual confirmation at 1440px and 375px.

headingScale.detail: FeaturedEvents.php headingSize => 2. ThemeHeading renders h2 at text-header-2 scale. Section headings visually larger than text-header-3 in prior runs.

dateBadgeLayout.detail: Badge uses flex natural flow (relative, ml-auto) inside items-end container — sits bottom-right. No absolute positioning on badge itself. Visible spacing from inner frame edges via container's p-2 padding. All 5 event-bearing section groups confirmed.

fixedHeightRemoved.detail: md:h-[349px] absent from all anchor elements. Cards drive their own height from content. Confirmed by DOM selector returning 0 matches site-wide.

imageAspectRatio.detail: aspect-[4/3] on mobile (DOM + visual: constrained portrait-ish box). md:aspect-auto md:h-full on desktop (image fills card height). Both selectors confirmed in all event-bearing sections.

noRegressions.detail: All checks from prior PASS runs remain green: HTTP 200, no JS errors, no overflow, 7 block instances in demo-containers, future ASC / past DESC ordering, postsLimit honored, buttonLabel passthrough, hideIfEmpty, correct event permalinks, venue names visible, bg-dark-pattern on card halves, btn-tertiary-arrow arrow icon present, images with srcset/lazy/dimensions.

observations: Section headings render at clearly larger size consistent with text-header-2 (48px+ scale)
Card titles display in mixed-case: 'Indie Game Developers Summit', 'Virtual Reality Expo 2026', 'Summer Gaming Fest 2026'
Cards are content-driven height — no fixed height constraint visible, content half and image half align naturally
Dark-pattern textured background visible on both card halves
Date badges visible bottom-right of image frames with clear spacing from frame edges
Arrow icon visible alongside VIEW EVENT text
Venue names ('Rogers Arena', 'BC Place Stadium') and excerpts visible in content half
First card anchor in hovered state (group active)
btn-tertiary span carries group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]! — correct Tailwind group-hover wiring confirmed
Hover interaction captured correctly by Playwright action
Image panels show constrained 4:3 aspect ratio box stacked above content panels
Date badge sits bottom-right inside image frame via ml-auto flex positioning
Card titles in mixed case at large text-header-2 size
Content stacks correctly: image panel then content panel vertically

passedChecks: Build passes — 0 errors, 0 lint issues in FeaturedEvents
TSX/PHP sync validated — all checks pass
Section headings visually larger at 1440px — text-header-2 scale
Card h3 has no uppercase class — 'text-header-2' only
Titles render mixed case: 'Indie Game Developers Summit', 'Virtual Reality Expo 2026', etc.
Date badge uses flex flow (relative ml-auto) inside items-end container
Date badge positioned bottom-right with p-2 inner frame spacing — confirmed in DOM and visually
group-hover:text-[var(--accent-color)]! on btn-tertiary span with group on parent anchor
md:h-[349px] absent from all anchor elements — DOM selector returned 0 matches
aspect-[4/3] on image container — confirmed DOM + visual (375px)
md:aspect-auto md:h-full on image container — confirmed DOM + visual (1440px)
No regressions: ordering, postsLimit, buttonLabel, venue names, dark-pattern cards, arrow icon all still passing
